contents:
Anti-homosexuality deduction:
1, The violation of natural's breed.
2,Aesthetics. Creature of nature is beautiful, as well as something utility. But homosexuality is neither natural nor utility, it's so ugly and evil.
3,We oppose it because we cannot support it. In accordance with Slippery slope, if someone like the same sex, he will also like a desk or a chair.
4,The relationship between HIV and homosexuality.
5,Syllogism.Most people is right. Homosexuality is not most people. So homosexuality is not right.
6, Syllogism. Low is the will of people. Low does not protect homosexuality now. So homosexuality is not the will of people. So it's antihuman.
7, There's nothing discrimination. So we should talk about homosexuality.
Nobody care it because I don't care it.
8, Objection for Objection. Now that you have right to support homosexuality, I have the right to oppose it. I can achieve my right through my objection.
